metadata.purpose: SOURCE OF TRUTH for manuscript prose once populated. Each paragraph carries its proposition, dependencies, the draft_prose itself, a review object, and an audit object. manuscript/mi-spectral.qmd is compiled from this file by scripts/compile_manuscript.py and never edited directly.
metadata.compile_note: compile_enabled stays false until the decomposition of the existing draft (commit 180e2b5) into paragraphs is complete and reviewed; until then the existing qmd remains the working document.

schema_example.proposition: The constrained MI fit projects in the I_com metric because the Q-function's curvature is the complete-data information; substituting I_obs reproduces the naive formula.

review.serves_L2: Which super-proposition this paragraph delivers (by id).
review.serves_L1: Which thesis component / arc move it ultimately serves.
review.sets_up: Which later paragraphs rely on it.
review.topic_sentence: Verbatim, checked to carry the proposition.

schema_example.draft_prose: The paragraph text, ordinary Quarto markdown: @TODO:example citations in @-form, display math with anchors, theorem divs all pass through the compiler verbatim.

audit.notes: citations: bare citekey -> verdict string. numbers: claim -> pointer (verif:..., deriv:...).

metrics_gate.notes: Evaluated when paragraphs are populated. No lag gate: logical order, not reader-distance, governs a theory paper; dependencies are still recorded so audit corrections can find their blast radius.
